speaker: speaker1
text: Hello . Could you have a taxi pick me up before 10:00 a . m . ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I stay at No . 115 Fucking Road .

speaker: speaker2
text: OK , a taxi will be there by 9:30 .

speaker: speaker2
text: It is RIB 10 yuan initially and 2 yuan for each kilometer .

speaker: speaker1
text: I have a lot of luggage . Will those fit in the taxi ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Take it easy . I'll send a larger to pick you up .
